party_level: <INTEGER: Combined average or uniform level of the adventuring group>

characters.name: <STRING: Character's given name, used as primary key>
characters.ac: <INTEGER: Total static Armor Class including armor, shields, and passive modifiers>
characters.init: <INTEGER: Total Initiative modifier (Dexterity modifier + any feature bonuses)>
characters.dc_pass: <INTEGER: Passive Perception score (10 + Perception skill modifier)>
characters.dc_ins: <INTEGER: Passive Insight score (10 + Insight skill modifier)>

skills.<STRING: skill_name_lowercase_abbreviate: <INTEGER: Total modifier for proficient/expert skills only. Omit non-proficient skills.>

cond: <STRING: Active status conditions or tracking arrays, e.g., 'poisoned', 'blinded', 'exhaustion_2'. Empty if healthy.>
inv: <STRING: Item Name with optional count in parentheses, e.g., 'Rations (5)', 'Potion of Healing'>
